svg.title: Internal structure of the lib directory
svg.desc: The lib folder contains main.dart as the entry point, an app folder, a core folder of cross-cutting infrastructure grouped into foundation, platform services, and UI, a features folder with six feature slices, and gen and l10n folders.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What happens in main.dart on startup in this template?')
sendPrompt('Explain app.dart and router.dart in this template')
sendPrompt('What is in lib/core foundation: config, di, error, usecases, utils?')
sendPrompt('Explain the platform service modules in lib/core: network, firebase, media, notifications')
sendPrompt('What UI modules live in lib/core: theme, layout, animation, widgets?')
sendPrompt('Walk me through the auth feature in this template')
sendPrompt('Walk me through the bookmarks feature and its offline sync')
sendPrompt('What is in the home feature?')
sendPrompt('What is in the profile feature?')
sendPrompt('What is in the settings feature?')
sendPrompt('How does the splash feature gate session restoration?')
sendPrompt('What does the gen/ folder hold in a flutter_gen setup?')
sendPrompt('How is localization structured in lib/l10n?')
